message:
*No Brokerage, No Set Up Cost* Just carry your essentials and move in*
Looking for a female flatmate in Fully Furnished 4 BHK - gated society in Sector 47 Gurgaon, near Subhash Chowk. 

We are looking for 1 FEMALE flatmate to share our spacious and well maintained home. 

Available from 1st July.

The available room comes with:

* Attached Balcony
* Fully furnished setup with AC, bed, mattress, wardrobe, spacious balcony and curtains
*Attached washroom BUT SHARED WITH ONE OTHER ROOM* 

🏠 Flat Amenities:

• Fully equipped kitchen, Refrigerator, Washing machine, Microwave, RO water purifier
•No wifi charges at the moment
• Kitchen utilities included
• Dedicated car parking
• 24×7 water and electricity supply
• Gated society with security

Rent & Other Charges:

* Rent: 17,600/month ( including Maintenance )
* Security Deposit: 20k
*Cook (3 meals/day): Approx. ₹2,000 per person
*House Cleaning: Approx. ₹1,000 per person
* Electricity, groceries, etc. to be shared equally among 4 flatmates

message:
Looking for a female replacement in Mayfield Garden Block D, Sector 50
🌸 Hey girls 💕

If you're someone who dreams of coming home to a space that actually feels warm and yours, I think I have something special for you.

My room in Mayfield Gardens, Block D, Sector 50 (Gurgaon) is up for grabs. I’m moving out and honestly, it’s going to be hard to leave this little corner.

It’s a proper sunlit, airy room with the sweetest cross breeze. Newly done up, fully furnished : AC, comfy bed, geyser, big mirror, side table, everything sorted. You also get your own attached washroom and the most beautiful balcony. The view from there? I swear it melts my stress away every single evening.

We’re in a safe, gated society with a really homely vibe. The flatmates are chill, the owner is super easygoing. No weird rules about food, friends, smoking, or anything. Just good energy and respect.

Walking distance to Baani Square and Nirvana Courtyard, Good Earth Mall is 2 kms, IFC around 3. Super convenient for anyone working that side.

Rent is ₹19,667 per month.

Available from 8th July (we can talk dates).

One-time cost (fully refundable when the next person moves in): Rs. 47,668

Shared: 

Maid ₹1000 pp, 

WiFi ₹275 pp, 

electricity as per usage (charged at 6 rupees per unit)

Cook is optional if you want two time meals.(₹3000 pp)

We are getting a CNG pipeline laid in our society so gas costs will be gone in no time.

Utensils and groceries are your own: cook whatever your heart wants, whenever.

If this feels like it could be your new happy place, just DM me. Happy to show you around and chat.

 Would love to pass this room to someone who’ll actually enjoy it the way I did 🤍

Looking for a genuine, decent girl who values a peaceful home.

See you soon maybe? ✨

message:
🌸 Looking for a Female Flatmates
Hi girls! 💕

We're are 3 corporate girlies-  looking for a lovely female flatmates to join us in our beautiful 4 BHK home in Ardee City, Sector 52, Gurgaon from July 1

Its a home that feels warm, cozy, and peaceful after a long day. Think lots of natural light, cute corners, a spacious setup, and a home that you'll genuinely look forward to coming back to. ✨

🏡 About the house:

• Semi furnished and beautifully maintained

• Spacious rooms and common areas

• Safe and secure gated community

• Great location with everything nearby(Ardee mall, gym, sports academy at 100 m) 

• Freshly constructed so first move in

• ⁠Modular kitchen with installed stove, microwave and OTG

• ⁠Ambient lighting with touch and sensor control

• ⁠Attached washroom and huge balcony with green grass with each room 

• ⁠AC cum Heater fitted in the room

Rent - 23.5k

Move in - last week of June or 1 July 

We're hoping to find someone who is easy-going, respectful, and looking for a comfortable space to call home. Bonus points if you enjoy the occasional chai, movie night, or random life conversations. 🤍

DM me for location, other details, or to schedule a visit. We'd love to meet you! 🌷

message:
*Available immediately*

Looking for a Female Flatmate – DLF Phase 2, Gurgaon

We’re working professionals living in a 3BHK in DLF Phase 2, and we’ve got one fully furnished room up for grabs.

The house is fully equipped with:

Fridge, TV, microwave and a power backup.

The room comes fully furnished with an AC, geyser, bed, cupboard and a mid length mirror with drawers.

The location is safe and in a gated community. About a 200m walk from the MG road Metro station.
Rent is 20,000 including maintainance

We eat & cook non-veg and would prefer someone who doesn’t have a problem about this. We also have a maid who charges 4k a month.
One of the girls has a cook who can take up additional work if required.

We’d prefer someone who takes care of the space like their own because we try to function as a ideal household with each flatmate having their set of responsibilities and ideally someone who doesn’t have a live-in set up with their partner.

Feel free to DM if interested.
